phrases.intent_en: Ask about show tickets for tonight
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il reste des places pour le spectacle de ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel REST day PLAHS poor luh spek-TAHKL duh suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Moulin Rouge often sells out weeks ahead. Book online in advance. The 9 PM show is most popular; the 11 PM show is sometimes easier to get.

responses.english: There are seats left for tonight. The show starts at nine.
responses.phonetic: eel rest day plass poor suh swahr. luh spek-TAH-kluh koh-MAHNS ah vant ay oon uhr
responses.local: Il reste des places pour ce soir. Le spectacle commence à vingt et une heures.

phrases.text_local: Quelle est la différence entre le dîner-spectacle et le spectacle seul ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah dee-fay-RAHNSS ahntr luh dee-NAY spek-TAHKL ay luh spek-TAHKL SUHL
phrases.cultural_note: The dinner-show includes a French meal before the 9 PM revue. Show-only tickets (champagne included) are less expensive. Both see the same spectacular 'Féerie' show.

responses.english: The dinner show starts at seven.
responses.phonetic: luh dee-NAY spek-TAH-kluh koh-MAHNS ah dee-NUHF uhr
responses.local: Le dîner-spectacle commence à dix-neuf heures.

phrases.text_local: Comment faut-il s'habiller pour le Moulin Rouge ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN foh-TEEL sah-bee-YAY poor luh moo-LAHN ROOZH
phrases.cultural_note: Smart elegant dress is required. No sportswear, shorts, or sneakers. Men should wear a jacket. Think 'Parisian night out' — it's part of the experience.

responses.english: Elegant dress recommended. No shorts or sneakers.
responses.phonetic: tuh-NOO ay-lay-GAHNT ruh-koh-mahn-DAY. pah duh short nee duh bas-KET
responses.local: Tenue élégante recommandée. Pas de short ni de baskets.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the show starts
phrases.text_local: Le spectacle commence à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh spek-TAHKL koh-MAHNSS ah kel UHR
phrases.cultural_note: There are typically two shows: 9 PM and 11 PM. Arrive 30 minutes early for seating. The show lasts about 2 hours with an intermission.

responses.english: The show starts at eleven PM.
responses.phonetic: luh spek-TAH-kluh koh-MAHNS ah vant-trwaz uhr
responses.local: Le spectacle commence à vingt-trois heures.
